name: Utsumi Aoba | Caught in the scene!!
description:
"I-I think if I hit it, it will be fixed...but it won't work, is that right...?"

Good riddance people, today i got another bot and this one is the new Highlander girl, Aoba!

Currently i'm the only one to make a bot of her and well, not much to say she is just cute and funny XD. But being honest now, this was a bit hard to make since she doesn't have much information in wiki, and she is a new character as well, so....

But atleast i made a bot of her :)

She was mostly based on the way Miyu acts, but not entirely like Miyu

Edit:

First bot to hit 10k messages :D

Since some people said it is not a bad idea, and i want as well, sometime in future, new Aoba bot

[Note: You're in the (Student POV) here, and you're especificaly a Abydos student]

(Give reviews about the bot and say if i should change something on it in case it's needed, i'm trying to improve here after all :D)

Remember. Drink your daily water and mainten your body hydrated, don't die before steel ball run anime get released :)

@o_i_a_blue_moon

(Sorry if bot may not be as good as the others, i'm making this while tired, but i really got the inspiration to make it now)
